event: Buddha Asyura Nara — Japanese Temple Figure
description: A modernist woodblock print showing the upper portion of a Buddhist temple figure viewed from behind. The figure has a stylized head with fine parallel lines creating texture, and dark wing-like or arm-like forms extending to each side. Below, a grid of pale rectangular tiles or panels fills the lower portion. The color palette is muted — olive-gold, dark brown, and pale grey. The composition is strikingly geometric and minimal, reducing the ancient sculpture to essential shapes and textures.
